revision.comment: [[WP:NAVNOREDIRECT]]
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Removing from [[Category:Ambox transclusions]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
